headline: JPMorgan oil analysis ‘completely flawed,’ says Bessent
summary: Investing.com — U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent issued a sharp rebuke of JPMorgan Chase & Co (NYSE:JPM) on Friday, labeling the bank’s recent analysis of a government-backed oil insurance program as "terrible" and "completely irresponsible."

content.title: JPMorgan oil analysis ‘completely flawed,’ says Bessent
content.summary: Investing.com — U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent issued a sharp rebuke of JPMorgan Chase & Co (NYSE:JPM) on Friday, labeling the bank’s recent analysis of a government-backed oil insurance program as "terrible" and "completely irresponsible."

headline: How JPMorgan’s Neutral Stance Is Shaping The Sigma Foods de (BMV:SIGMAF A) Story
summary: Sigma Foods de is back in focus after JPMorgan reaffirmed its MX$20.29 price target, keeping the fair value view firmly in place. Bulls argue that this unchanged target lines up with current execution and leaves room if efficiency or cost control come in better than expected, while bears see the neutral stance as a sign that a lot of the story is already reflected in the price. In the sections that follow, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving narrative around Sigma Foods...
